item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p12","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer brakes immediately, refuses the requested graph-under-field repair, names the accumulated local additions (definition bar, update-time box, interpretation cell, graph field), reframes the repeated failure as missing unified metric/source-of-truth governance, and proposes a consolidated report-caliber contract shared by report page, charts, exports, and weekly reports. It does not provide the requested new field or implementation copy."}
